I see that the cast of "Predestination" includes Ethan Hawke and Sarah Snook, and I also see that the cast of "Predestination" includes Noah Taylor, who was in the Spierig Brothers' "Undead". I think I have it... The Australian actor I'm thinking of is Noah Taylor. I need to find a short story by Robert A. Heinlein that was adapted into a film. I know that Robert A. Heinlein wrote a short story called "All You Zombies—", which was adapted into the film "Predestination". I think I have it... The short story is "All You Zombies—".</think>
<answer> All You Zombies—</answer>
